value.name: incipit
value.summary: Template-driven CLI for transforming structured resume data into polished documents across multiple formats, featuring pluggable templates and AI-powered prompts for resume review and optimization.

value.name: mnemonist
value.summary: Local-first Rust CLI for AI agent memory management, supporting cognitive operations, markdown memories, semantic search with candle embeddings, and benchmarking on LongMemEval.

value.name: saige
value.summary: Unified Go SDK, CLI, and server for streaming AI agents, knowledge graphs, and RAG pipelines, integrating multiple AI providers behind a single interface.

value.name: flappy-bird
value.summary: JavaFX Flappy Bird clone showcasing data-oriented design and automated native builds for cross-platform desktop development.

value.name: chess-cli
value.summary: Fully playable chess game with object-oriented Python design and command-line interface, ideal for exploring game logic and chess AI algorithms.

value.name: agentspec
value.summary: Universal agent skill and sub-agent manager with a terminal user interface, built in Rust for flexible agent orchestration.

value.name: teasr
value.summary: Rust-based tool for capturing screenshots and GIFs from web apps, desktop, and terminal, delivered as a single binary with no runtime dependencies.

value.name: linear-gp
value.summary: Production-grade Rust framework for Linear Genetic Programming research, offering modular architecture, Q-Learning integration, and automated hyperparameter optimization.

value.name: lepus-classifier
value.summary: CNN research project investigating optimal image classification architectures for small datasets, highlighting data quantity as a key bottleneck.

value.name: dotfiles
value.summary: Cross-platform dotfiles managed with Chezmoi, featuring one-command bootstrap for macOS and Linux and integration with Neovim, Tmux, Zsh, and AI agent skills.

value.name: md-classifier
value.summary: Deep learning system combining transformers and CNNs to classify diseases from patient symptoms, leveraging semantic embeddings and achieving high recall.

value.name: duraturo
value.summary: Go utility for durable execution, enabling function wrapping with ledgers, workers, and queues over existing storage.

value.name: lazyspeak.nvim
value.summary: Voice-driven coding plugin for Neovim, allowing users to speak their intent and see edits appear in the editor.

value.name: generative-artifact-protocol
value.summary: Open standard for token-efficient artifact updates and streaming, featuring a Go apply engine and evaluation CLI.

value.name: github-insights
value.summary: AI-powered GitHub profile metrics tool with SVG visualizations, project classification, and README generation, available as CLI, npm package, and GitHub Action.

value.name: gymnasia
value.summary: Pure Rust implementation of OpenAI Gymnasium environments for reinforcement learning research.

value.name: urmzd.com
value.summary: Personal website, blog, and research portfolio built with Astro, React, and Three.js.

value.name: fsrc
value.summary: CLI, Rust crate, and GitHub Action for embedding source files into any text file using comment markers.

value.name: broadcast
value.summary: CLI tool for converting blog posts into platform-native content for X Articles and LinkedIn posts.

value.name: dispatch
value.summary: Beta control plane for agent execution nodes, deploying scalable sandboxed agents with NGAC policy enforcement and shared workspace metrics.

value.name: rlgp-thesis
value.summary: BCS thesis project focused on Reinforced Linear Genetic Programming, documented in TeX.

value.name: glassbox-lm
value.summary: Observable language models with readable hidden states, glassbox CLI for tracing and causal probing, and architectures designed for faithfulness coverage.

value.name: lightning-kfold
value.summary: Stratified K-fold cross-validation with ensemble voting for PyTorch Lightning, designed for easy integration.

value.name: zoro
value.summary: Privacy-first AI research agent with a persistent knowledge graph, running all inference locally for secure idea management.

value.name: oag
value.summary: OpenAPI 3.x code generator for TypeScript, React/SWR, and FastAPI, using Jinja2 template packs and supporting SSE streaming and literal-faithful enum output.

value.name: sr
value.summary: Release engineering CLI in Rust, offering automated semantic versioning from conventional commits with zero runtime dependencies.

value.name: languide
value.summary: Scenario-based language guides built from markdown, generating PDFs with full Unicode and CJK support for communication-focused learning.

value.name: urmzd
value.summary: GitHub profile README with auto-generated metrics, project spotlights, and portfolio tables, regenerated by github-insights.

value.name: streamsafe
value.summary: Type-safe async pipeline framework for data processing in Rust, supporting modular and robust workflows.

value.name: zigbee-skill
value.summary: AI-native smart home skill enabling direct control of Zigbee devices without cloud or hub dependencies.

value.name: cypress-name-too-long-mre
value.summary: Minimal reproducible example for a Cypress issue, using JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.

value.name: barter-trader
value.summary: Android trading app built with Clean Architecture and MVVM, facilitating peer-to-peer item exchanges with enterprise-grade mobile development patterns.

preamble.value: I build local-first systems and streaming agent SDKs from scratch—Rust and Go power mnemonist’s cognitive memory ops and saige’s unified AI pipelines. Based in Austin, I optimize for modularity, observability, and performance at every layer.
